steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes a concrete problem (conversion challenges between different gauges) and then states what historians call the system. The transition must connect this problem to historians' characterization of it.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
“Hence” (therefore) shows that the naming is a logical result of the uncoordinated gauge system described.

The other options don't establish cause-and-effect: “Rather,” suggests a correction, “For example,” presents naming as an example, and “Likewise,” signals a parallel.

That matches Choice B — Hence,.
